name: ts-surgeon
description: AST-accurate TypeScript/JavaScript refactoring: the ts-surgeon skill (drives the ts-surgeon CLI via npx) plus a PreToolUse guard that blocks hand-rolled sed/perl refactors and answers recursive identifier searches with real find_references output — failing open when it cannot answer — and a PostToolUse hook that teaches the exact ts-surgeon equivalent after each executed search (operator-only escape hatch: launch the agent with TS_SURGEON_ALLOW=1 in the environment).
